visual_description: A man in a dark suit and tie stands in front of a wall covered with maps and documents, holding a clipboard and looking toward the right. The scene shifts to a dimly lit, narrow alleyway with a red square sign hanging above a doorway. A person in a light-colored shirt walks past the man, partially obscuring the view.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice speaking in a neutral tone, with a moderate pace and pitch, and no noticeable prosody or background noise.
